stories.title: Torino, donna morta: il corpo nascosto nel cassettone del letto
stories.summary: Il corpo di Daniela Florea, 35 anni di origini romene, è stato trovato in un appartamento del quartiere Barriera di Milano, avvolto in un telo e nascosto nel vano contenitore del letto. La procura ha aperto un fascicolo per omicidio. L'autopsia è in programma domani. La casa era in ordine e gli investigatori non escludono che la vittima conoscesse il suo assassino ascolta articolo Sceglici su: Il corpo di una donna avvolto in un telo e nascosto nel vano contenitore del letto, in un appartamento trovato in perfetto ordine.

stories.title: The Undeclared War review – Simon Pegg’s cyber-attack thriller fails to push any of the right buttons
stories.summary: I f the espionage battles of the future are going to be fought online, TV thrillers will have to reflect that fact, much as they might not want to. Cyber-attacks, cross-border malware and digital misinformation just aren’t especially televisual: whatever you do, you always end up with a speed-typing nerd muttering “Shit!” as gobbledegook scrolls across a monitor and red lights flash in the distance. In 2022, Channel 4’s missable drama The Undeclared War tried to crack the problem by throwing heavyweight film-making pedigree at it.

stories.title: Arsenal set to make £70m bid for Newcastle's Guimaraes
stories.summary: Arsenal are set to make a £70m offer for Newcastle captain Bruno Guimaraes. Brazil international Guimaraes is a priority target for the Gunners, with the midfielder keen to join the Premier League champions. Newcastle are aware of the 28-year-old's preference to join Arsenal this summer. Talks over a potential move for Guimaraes are ongoing and are believed to have accelerated in recent days. The agreement of personal terms is not expected to be an issue, though it remains to be seen if Arsenal 's £70m offer will meet Newcastle 's valuation.

stories.title: Alerte Météo : Fortes chaleurs persistantes au sud
stories.summary: Du jeudi 23 juillet à 17:00 au vendredi 24 juillet à 18:00 Situation Les températures baissent légèrement autour de la Méditerranée, mais restent élevées avec 32 à 35°C, localement 36 à 37°C. Ce vendredi, la chaleur s’accentue dans le sud-ouest, avec plus de 40°C localement. Le mistral et le vent d’ouest maintiendront un risque d’incendie très élevé à maximal dans le sud-est. Enfin, une dégradation orageuse est attendue samedi sur un grand quart sud-est, avec une probable alerte. Par ailleurs, nous dirigeons vers une 4e canicule à l'échelle nationale la semaine prochaine. Observation Ce jeudi Les températures ont été très élevées au sud avec localement une chaleur extrême.

stories.title: DIRECT. Incendies en France: un sapeur-pompier blessé et évacué en combattant les flammes en Gironde
stories.summary: Un feu très virulent sévit depuis mercredi à proximité du bassin d'Arcachon en Gironde. Des évacuations, à titre préventif, sont menées par la préfecture. Dans le Var, les pompiers n'ont toujours pas fixé l'incendie "contenu" ce jeudi 23 juillet, alors que l'inquiétude est ravivée par les conditions météorologiques. Aujourd'hui à 21h37 Un pompier en Gironde évoque un incendie "toujours hors de contrôle" Guillaume Millet, sapeur-pompier et secrétaire fédéral CFDT en Gironde évoque un feu d'une "violence similaire" aux incendies qui ont touché la Gironde en 2022. "Ce feu peut partir dans n'importe quel sens aujourd'hui", explique-t-il à BFMTV.

stories.title: Consumentenbond ziet opnieuw misleiding door groot techbedrijf: massaclaim tegen Thuisbezorgd dreigt
stories.summary: Thuisbezorgd verborgen kosten 23 jul 2026, 18:52 Wil je net afrekenen, moet je ineens 4 euro extra betalen. Bij Thuisbezorgd gebeurt het regelmatig. De Consumentenbond wil nu dat het platform klanten daarvoor compenseert. Uniek is het overigens niet, veel meer webwinkels hebben verborgen kosten. Volgens de Consumentenbond zijn honderden miljoenen mensen gedupeerd omdat ze bij het afrekenen ineens meer kosten kregen voor verplichte service, tasjes, plastic verpakkingen en saus. Kosten die eerder in het bestelproces duidelijk hadden moeten zijn. Als Thuisbezorgd niet snel iets verandert, komt de Consumentenbond met een massaclaim. Een middel dat steeds vaker wordt gebruikt.

stories.title: Colapinto lanza un dardo al Mundial de España: "Fueron muy aburridos con las canciones"
stories.summary: El gol de Ferran Torres en el minuto 106 de la final del MetLife de Nueva Jersey sigue en boca de todos. Fue el que coronó a España por segunda vez, tras el mítico gol de Andrés Iniesta en el Soccer City ante Holanda, en la Copa del Mundo de Fútbol. Un tanto que derrotó a la campeona defensora Argentina y que tiene eco hasta en la Fórmula 1. En Spa se vivió casi más la final que el Gran Premio de Bélgica y su resaca juega un papel en Hungría. La Fórmula 1 lo aprovechó y juntó en la misma rueda de prensa a los dos españoles, Carlos Sainz y Fernando Alonso, con el único argentino, Franco Colapinto. Sobre el campeón no existió debate. "Siempre sentí que ganaría España.

stories.title: World Matchplay Darts LIVE! Updates, video, analysis, scores, commentary with Luke Littler, Gary Anderson, Josh Rock in action
stories.summary: Live Watch the World Matchplay Darts 2026 across Sky Sports from July 18 until July 2026 Thursday 23 July 2026 20:49, UK This content is provided by , which may be using cookies and other technologies. stories.title: Charlize Theron under fire for comments on Matt Damon's body in The Odyssey
stories.summary: Charlize Theron is receiving criticism following remarks about co-star Matt Damon's physical appearance while promoting The Odyssey. The Oscar-winning actress, who portrays Calypso alongside Damon's Odysseus in Christopher Nolan's upcoming film , discussed the actor's look candidly during a recent interview. While addressing Damon's preparation for the character, Theron acknowledged she was struck by his transformation. "I've seen him without all of that suit on. He's incredible. Incredible," she shared in a new interview. Theron then continued, making light of the fact that she found herself noticing more than simply his acting on set for The Odyssey, which just came out this week.

stories.title: Le previsioni meteo in Friuli Venezia Giulia di venerdì 24 luglio
stories.summary: 23 Luglio 2026 Il meteo in Friuli Venezia Giulia per venerdì 24 luglio sarà caratterizzato da condizioni in prevalenza stabili , con cielo generalmente sereno. Nel corso del pomeriggio, potranno aumentare gli annuvolamenti, in particolare sui rilievi , mentre il quadro meteorologico resterà nel complesso stabile. Temperature e venti Le temperature previste indicano valori massimi compresi tra 26 e 29 gradi in pianura , mentre lungo la costa le massime saranno tra 26 e 28 gradi. In montagna, a quota 2 mila metri, le temperature massime si attesteranno intorno ai 9 gradi. I venti saranno generalmente a regime di brezza ; in serata sulla costa è prevista la possibilità di Bora moderata.

stories.title: Samsung étend son écosystème Galaxy aux lunettes connectées
stories.summary: Développées avec Gentle Monster et Warby Parker, les lunettes intelligentes permettent à chaque utilisateur de défendre son style. Samsung Electronics Co., Ltd. A présenté aujourd’hui ses lunettes intelligentes lors de la conférence Galaxy Unpacked à Londres. Basés sur des concepts présentés lors du dernier évènement Google I/O, ces modèles ont été développés avec des lunetiers reconnus : Gentle Monster et Warby Parker. Ces lunettes intelligentes montent comment l’écosystème Galaxy va bien au-delà du smartphone pour transformer notre façon de travailler, de profiter et d’exécuter des tâches en gardant les mains libres.

stories.title: About 150 women turned away for private care by National Maternity Hospital consultants
stories.summary: About 150 women have been turned away for private care by consultants at the National Maternity Hospital (NMH) over the last six weeks, as private maternity services begin to end in Irish hospitals . A senior clinician at one of the biggest maternity hospitals in the country said it was only the second time in almost 30 years that he could recall doctors at Holles Street refusing mothers who wanted to go private. Declan Keane, clinical director and former master at the NMH, said the end of private maternity care in publicly funded hospitals was “kicking in already” and “will be a real problem” over the next five years.

stories.title: Carlos Latre se marcha de Mediaset: "Cuando termine 'Got Talent' finaliza mi contrato"
stories.summary: Carlos Latre se marcha de Mediaset. El cómico ha revelado esta información en exclusiva en una entrevista a la revista Lecturas, en el marco del estreno de la nueva película de Tadeo Jones, donde ha puesto voz a varios personajes. Ha sido en una pregunta relacionada con Got Talent donde el intérprete ha confirmado su salida del grupo de comunicación. "¿Dónde más te vamos a poder ver?", le pregunta el periodista Adrián López, a lo que Latre le responde: "Estamos todavía acabando la grabación de Got Talent, una nueva edición en la que se crean equipos y hay una dinámica diferente. Y luego después ya finaliza mi contrato y mi colaboración con Mediaset".

stories.title: Bruce Willis makes ultra-rare public appearance amid health battle
stories.summary: Bruce Willis was spotted riding around Studio City in Los Angeles on July 19, in an ultra-rare appearance for the Die Hard actor, who was diagnosed with frontotemporal dementia (FTD) in 2023. The 71-year-old looked laid back as he sat in the passenger seat, dressed in a blue jacket and navy trucker cap. The outing comes amid his health battle, which has caused Bruce to lose much of his ability to speak due to the debilitating brain disorder. FTD symptoms can range from changes in behavior to loss of empathy and memory issues. Bruce was initially diagnosed with aphasia in 2022, before his family discovered that he was actually suffering from FTD.

stories.title: Ascolti tv ieri, vince 'Tim Summer Hits': lo show di Rai 1 batte Canale 5
stories.summary: Home Spettacoli Ascolti tv, 'Tim Summer Hits' su Rai1 vince prime time: share al 18.6% . Lo show ha ottenuto un ascolto medio di oltre due milioni di spettatori Carlo Conti e Andrea Delogu - Ipa/Fotogramma 22 luglio 2026 | 12.24 Ilaria Floris LETTURA: 1 minuti E' Rai1 con 'Tim Summer Hits' a vincere la sfida della prima serata di ieri, martedì 21 luglio 2026 . Lo show ha ottenuto un ascolto medio di 2.015.000 spettatori, pari al 18.6% di share. Canale5, con 'Delibal – Dolce veleno', è stato la scelta di 1.397.000 spettatori, con uno share del 12.4%.

stories.title: Resident Evil's killer new trailer throws Raccoon City's worst at Austin Abrams
stories.summary: Follow Empire on Google We’re slap-bang in the middle of summer right now. But once The Odyssey and Spider-Man: Brand New Day and The End Of Oak Street are done delivering popcorn thrills, it’ll be time to pivot to spooky-mode. And of all the horror offerings in the upcoming Halloween slate, one looks particularly exciting: Zach Cregger’s Resident Evil . The director of Weapons is already back with his follow-up film, a rollocking ride through the world of the beloved games, but with a story and character of Cregger’s own creation: Austin Abrams’ non-heroic normie, Bryan.

stories.title: Rayner rules out repaying severance cash after making cabinet return
stories.summary: A lump sum, equivalent of 25% of the annual ministerial salary, is payable when a minister stops holding office. Departing ministers who are aged over 65 or are reappointed within three weeks do not qualify. The 2025/26 accounts , external for the Ministry of Housing, Communities and Local Government record the severance payment for Rayner. In her first interview since returning to government, Rayner was pressed on whether she would return the money.

stories.title: Fonte des glaces au Groenland: des chercheurs révèlent son véritable impact sur l’AMOC
stories.summary: La circulation méridienne de retournement de l’Atlantique (AMOC) est l'un des principaux systèmes de courants océaniques de la planète et joue un rôle essentiel dans la régulation du climat mondial. Concrètement, elle transporte une immense quantité de chaleur vers l'Europe, contribuant à son climat relativement doux, influence les précipitations en Afrique, en Amérique du Sud et en Amérique du Nord, participe au stockage de la chaleur et du dioxyde de carbone dans les océans et agit sur le niveau de la mer et les événements météorologiques extrêmes.

stories.title: Final hurrah? Glasgow’s cut-price Commonwealth Games fight for survival
stories.summary: S ometimes when a non-responsive person is close to death, a strange medical phenomena occurs. From apparently nowhere they experience a burst of energy. They recognise people again. They start to speak in sentences. Relatives even dare to hope. But, sadly, that hope is short-lived. Doctors call it terminal lucidity. And it comes to mind at the dawn of the 23rd Commonwealth Games . Less than three years ago, the Games were on life support after the original hosts, Victoria, effectively paid AUS$380m (£199m) to pull out because it feared losses running into the billions. Glasgow then stepped in to host a cheaper and stripped back event, with only 10 sports compared to 19 four years ago.

stories.title: The Commonwealth’s greatest prize lies beyond the Games
stories.summary: Today, Glasgow will once again become the meeting place of the Commonwealth, as athletes and supporters from 56 nations descend on its red-sandstone streets for the Commonwealth Games . For the next fortnight, sporting triumphs will capture the attention of millions across the Commonwealth. Josh Kerr and Adam Peaty will have the British willing them towards gold. Yet when the closing ceremony draws to an end, another prize will remain before us – one with the power to enrich every Commonwealth citizen: the untapped capacity of our network to increase trade, investment and enterprise between its members.

stories.title: L'allarme Mar Rosso spinge il petrolio a 100$ e affonda le Borse. Milano chiude a -2,8%
stories.summary: (Il Sole 24 Ore Radiocor) - Archiviano una seduta di vendite le Borse europee , con il Ftse Mib in ribasso del 2,8% , mentre lo spettro di uno shock energetico che torna protagonista sulla scena globale. Alle preoccupazioni su un’imminente escalation delle ostilità tra Washington e Teheran si sommano infatti gli attacchi da parte dei ribelli Houthi dello Yemen nel Mar Rosso, che minacciano le vitali forniture di petrolio dell'Arabia Saudita: a far paura ora è la chiusura simultanea dello stretto di Bab al-Mandab (oltre che dello Stretto di Hormuz), una delle ultime rotte rimaste per il trasporto del greggio del Golfo verso i mercati globali.

stories.title: Spritpreise in Europa: Dieser Konzern deckelt jetzt den Literpreis
stories.summary: Frankreich greift durch Total deckelt Preise an 3.300 Tankstellen 23.07.2026 - 10:37 Uhr Lesedauer: 1 Min. Während Frankreich die Spritpreise deckelt, plant Berlin keine neue Unterstützung für Autofahrer. Ein Energiekonzern greift nun zu einer drastischen Maßnahme und nennt eine überraschende Begründung. Der Konflikt mit dem Iran treibt die Kraftstoffpreise in Europa nach oben. In Frankreich reagiert der Energiekonzern Total und stoppt die Teuerung an seinen Zapfsäulen. Die deutsche Bundesregierung dagegen plant keine erneute Unterstützung für Autofahrer. Loading... Embed Preisgarantie an 3.300 Zapfsäulen Der Mineralölriese Total begrenzt ab sofort seine Preise in Frankreich.

stories.title: Shels and Derry search for Conference League sparks
stories.summary: CONFERENCE LEAGUE SECOND ROUND QUALIFIER, FIRST LEG Shelbourne v Nomme Kalju, Tolka Park, 7.45pm Rijeka v Derry City, Stadion HNK Rijeka, 7.45pm WATCH Rijeka v Derry City is available to stream via the club's website. Shelbourne v Nomme Kalju is available to stream via LOITV. ONLINE Live blog on RTÉ.ie/Sport and the RTÉ News app. Shels enter Europe searching for a spark It has been a very disappointing campaign for Shelbourne, who are currently fifth in the league table, 16 points off Shamrock Rovers. They just haven't got going this year, with Joey O'Brien's June departure the inevitable conclusion to a rotten run of form.

stories.title: FCC Chairman Brendan Carr’s war on the First Amendment
stories.summary: As the chairman of the Federal Communications Commission, Brendan Carr has authority over the nation’s TV, radio, and internet. But since Donald Trump was elected to his second term, Carr has wielded that power to threaten broadcasters that have exercised their free speech rights to make jokes about the president. He was even able to get ABC to briefly pull Jimmy Kimmel from his late-night show. As The Verge editor-in-chief Nilay Patel has said, Carr’s mission is to “trash the First Amendment.” We’ll be following closely as the FCC chairman attempts to erode Americans’ constitutional rights.

stories.title: „Das Fest“ 2026: Jetzt bringt Nico Santos den Hügel zum Beben
stories.summary: Live-Ticker vom Gelände „Das Fest“ 2026: Jetzt bringt Nico Santos den Hügel zum Beben „Das Fest“ 2026 hat begonnen. Alle Infos und Eindrücke des beliebten Karlsruher Sommer-Events gibt’s im Liveticker. Nico Santos sorgt für große Begeisterung im Publikum. Foto: Nelly Kühn „Das Fest“ 2026 hat begonnen. Alle Informationen und Eindrücke des beliebten Karlsruher Sommer-Events gibt’s im Liveticker.

stories.title: Matt Damon and Ben Affleck have been friends for decades, but now their lives are worlds apart
stories.summary: Forty years ago, two Boston buddies shared a dream. One Oscar later, their personal lives and Hollywood careers couldn’t be more different Marianka Swain Show biography Marianka Swain has been a culture and features writer for the Telegraph since 2018. She covers a wide range of topics, from celebrity and royal stories to West End openings and the dilemmas of modern life. She is a Strictly Come Dancing devotee, but sadly has never won a trophy for her own moves, glitterball or otherwise. Published 14 July 2026 2:00pm BST The four-decade friendship between A-listers Matt Damon and Ben Affleck is astonishingly enduring, given the fickle nature of Hollywood.

stories.title: Meet Gal Gadot's businessman husband and 4 lookalike daughters
stories.summary: Gal Gadot catapulted to global fame following her breakout performance as Wonder Woman i n the 2017 hit. The 41-year-old Israeli actress has since become one of Hollywood's most recognisable faces, earning a spot on Time's 100 most influential people in the world in 2018, as well as a star on the Hollywood Walk of Fame in 2025. The Snow White star, also known for her roles in Red Notice and Death on the Nile , balances her thriving career with a busy family life as the mother of four daughters. © WireImage Gal Gadot is famed for her stellar Hollywood career Keep reading to find out more about Gal's life off-screen with her businessman husband and children.

stories.title: Walking outside in Malaga in 40C 'like opening an oven door'
stories.summary: Updated / Thursday, 23 Jul 2026 16:57 Emily Allen and her son Matias at home in Spain An Irish woman living in Spain has described trying to live and work in Malaga at the moment as difficult due to temperatures topping 40C. Emily Allen has been living in Spain for 25 years. She told RTÉ's News at One that the problem is not just the high temperatures. "It's also the fact that here we have the Terral wind, which is basically hot wind kind of blowing in your face the minute you walk outside, it's like opening an oven door. "Also, we have what's called like Saharan calima, kind of like a haze of desert dust, which has just come over in the last hour. So, it's all hazy at the moment.

stories.title: Singapour: l'interdiction du chewing-gum, entre contrôle social et obsession hygiéniste
stories.summary: Singapour est réputée pour ses rues impeccables, ses transports publics efficaces et l'application extrêmement stricte de ses lois. Nombre d'entre elles concernent l'hygiène et la propreté, dont la plus célèbre est l'interdiction quasi totale du chewing-gum. Sur le chewing-gum, la loi singapourienne ne mâche pas ses mots. Le Sale of Food Act indique que « la vente ou la publicité en faveur de la vente de tout chewing-gum est interdite » et le Regulation of Imports and Exports Act rappelle que « l'importation de chewing-gum à Singapour est interdite ». Contrevenir peut vous coûter cher : une amende de 2 000 dollars (1 300 euros) en cas de vente illégale.

stories.title: Patreon Lays Off 20% of Employees as Part of ‘Painful’ Restructuring
stories.summary: Patreon , the creator-focused monetization platform, said on Thursday it was laying off 20% of its employees as it changed how its internal structure operates. The cuts will affect 93 Patreon employees, who will be given at least 16 weeks of severance payments. In a note to staff posted online, CEO Jack Conte said the company’s “core business” remained “strong and consistent,” but the platform had to respond to “profound” market changes this year affecting how Patreon navigates the creator economy. “We need to adjust our cost structure to ensure that we remain a stable, dependable rock for our creators as we work toward our long term ambition,” he wrote.

stories.title: Help for electricity bills as crude oil hits $100
stories.summary: The States of Guernsey said it would give Alderney Electricity £200,000 to offset islanders' bills. Jeannie Cameron, who chairs the committee, said the funds would be applied directly to customers' bills. She said: "The recent rise in global oil prices has the potential to place additional financial pressure on households and businesses at a time when many are already managing increased costs. "This temporary measure provides a level of protection against exceptional fuel price increases while ensuring that public funds are only used where they are genuinely needed." Cameron said unlike its sister islands Guernsey and Jersey, Alderney did not have cable supplying electricity from France.

stories.title: France evacuates 20,000 as wildfires spread in south-west
stories.summary: Wildfires in the Gironde region of south-west France have prompted the evacuation of 20,000 people, including 10,000 visitors from campsites, as flames have consumed 3,400 hectares of land. Approximately 700 firefighters are battling the blazes, with conditions worsening due to rising temperatures and strong winds. Authorities are continuing evacuations and closing roads in vulnerable areas as they work to contain the fires.

stories.title: Burnham says 20% business rates cut for English pubs 'a first step'
stories.summary: Some hospitality firms will get a discount from next April but hotels and restaurants won't get a cut. By Henry Zeffman Chief political correspondent and Archie Mitchell Business reporter Pubs, social clubs and live music venues in England will be given a 20% cut to business rates from April, with new Prime Minister Andy Burnham calling it a "first step" to help the industry. It is his third policy announcement since entering No 10, and the government estimates the plan will save firms around £1,100 next year. With a cost of £100m, it will be funded by a review of tax relief on firms such as vape shops which "do not make a positive contribution to local communities", the government said.

stories.title: The CW's Near-Perfect 4-Season Comedy Is Finally Heading to Free Streaming Next Month
stories.summary: Published Jul 18, 2026, 4:00 PM EDT Florencia is a Movies & TV writer at CBR who brings her love of pop culture and storytelling to every piece she writes. Whether diving into the humor of sitcoms, the creativity of adult animation, or the thrills of horror, she enjoys exploring what makes great entertainment resonate with audiences. Since joining CBR, Florencia has combined sharp analysis with a genuine enthusiasm for fan culture, always ready to discuss the stories, characters, and twists that keep viewers hooked. The CW is known for shows like Gossip Girl, The Vampire Diaries, Arrow, and Riverdale.

stories.title: LISTEN: How Travis Scott is Ascending to Culture Moguldom Through Music, Movies, Retail, Business and More
stories.summary: Travis Scott is solidifying his status as a cultural mogul following a record-setting music tour and a role in Christopher Nolan's film "The Odyssey." His Cactus Jack production company has secured a first-look deal with Paramount Pictures, signaling his ambitions in film and television. As he continues to expand his influence through music, retail partnerships, and new ventures, Scott is poised to make a significant impact in the entertainment industry.

stories.title: Kerry unchanged as captain Geaney named among subs
stories.summary: Updated / Thursday, 23 Jul 2026 20:25 Seán O'Shea and Paudie Clifford have switched lines in the Kerry attack for Sunday's decider Kerry manager Jack O'Shea has named an unchanged side for Sunday’s All-Ireland football final against Mayo, with captain Paul Geaney named among the substitutes. The 35-year-old didn’t feature in the semi-final victory over Dublin and is listed among the substitutes. Should he be introduced, it would be an eight All-Ireland final appearance for the Dingle man. While the personnel remains the same, O’Connor has, on paper at least, tinkered with his attack.

stories.title: Wetterbericht für Niedersachsen/Bremen (23.07.2026)
stories.summary: Heute zeigt sich das Wetter in der Region überwiegend stark bewölkt. Vereinzelt sind Schauer möglich, im Tagesverlauf lockert die Bewölkung jedoch vielerorts auf. Vor allem im Nordosten ist mit mehr Sonnenschein zu rechnen. Die Höchstwerte liegen zwischen 18 und 21 Grad, es bleibt also eher kühl für die Jahreszeit. Der Wind weht schwach bis mäßig aus Nordwest, an der See kann er frisch und zeitweise böig sein. In der Nacht zum morgigen Freitag ist es zunächst klar, von Nordwesten zieht jedoch zunehmend starke Bewölkung auf, vereinzelt sind ein paar Tropfen möglich. Im Südosten bleibt es dagegen aufgeklart. Die Tiefstwerte liegen um 14 Grad an der See und um 10 Grad im Binnenland.

stories.title: "Chicago Med XI"
stories.summary: New episodes of the medical drama "Chicago Med" premiere Thursday, July 23, on Italia 1 at 9 p.m. The eleventh season follows doctors and nurses at Gaffney Chicago Medical Center as they tackle high-stakes emergencies and ethical dilemmas. The season introduces new cast members and explores unresolved storylines from the previous finale.

stories.title: Émission du jeudi 23 juillet 2026 en replay - ICI 19/20 - Provence Alpes Côte d'Azur
stories.summary: Ici JT Vidéo 38 min 57 s Français Tous publics Disponible jusqu'au 30/07/2026 Le rendez-vous vespéral des rédactions régionales de France Télévisions, avec les journaux locaux, la météo et les reportages propres à chaque région. stories.title: HNK Rijeka Away – Live Stream
stories.summary: We are delighted to provide details of a Live Stream for Thursday’s UEFA Conference League away leg against HNK Rijeka in Croatia. Partnering with Solidsport , the second qualifying round game at Stadion HNK Rijeka will be broadcast live on derrycityplay.com costing £12. Stream Link Commentary is due to be provided by Drive 105. The match will kick-off at 7.45pm Irish time , 8.45pm local. The Brunswick Moviebowl are also showing the game live in their cinema. Book Your Cinema Tickets here.

stories.title: Claude’s voice mode is now available for Opus and Sonnet
stories.summary: Until now, voice mode has only been available on Claude Haiku, Anthropic’s faster but less powerful model. Now the company is making its Opus and Sonnet models available in voice mode, and extending its reach into apps like Gmail, Slack, and Canva. When Anthropic launched voice mode last year, it was primarily focused on delivering answers to quick questions with minimal delay. But in a blog post, the company said people immediately started using voice mode for far more than casual queries. They were using it to work “through real business problems,” which Haiku was not really designed for.

stories.title: L.A. Production Volume Down Slightly, as Recovery Continues to Sputter
stories.summary: Los Angeles production volume fell slightly in the second quarter of 2026, as an increase in state tax incentives has failed to overcome industry headwinds. Shoot days for TV, film and commercials dropped by 3.1% compared to the previous quarter, according to FilmLA , which tracks location permit data for the L.A. region. Films and commercials both dropped, offsetting an increase in TV production for the quarter — though all three categories remain well below historic levels. California more than doubled its support for film and TV production last year in response to the post-strike slump.

stories.title: Look for NASA+ Now Streaming on Amazon Fire TV
stories.summary: NASA+ is now streaming on Amazon Fire TV Channels starting July 24, 2026. Viewers can access the free, ad-free service via Alexa+ on compatible devices or through the NASA app and website. Future coverage will include Artemis missions, lunar deliveries, and the first crewed Moon landing.

stories.title: Italy confirm Ancelotti approach before Guardiola
stories.summary: Italy held discussions with Carlo Ancelotti to become their national team manager before opening talks with Pep Guardiola. Italy approached Carlo Ancelotti to become their national team manager before holding talks with Pep Guardiola. The Azzurri have been without a head coach since Gennaro Gattuso resigned in April following the country's failure to qualify for a third successive World Cup. Earlier this week, Italian Football Federation (FIGC) president Giovanni Malago said talks had been held with Guardiola, who left Manchester City this summer after 10 years, and "exceptions" could be made for his salary.

stories.title: Hochspannende Miniserie bei Netflix: Dieser Thriller lässt euch mit düsterem Geheimnis 8 Folgen lang keine Ruhe
stories.summary: In dieser Thriller-Serie bei Netflix zählt jede Minute: Ein Teil von ihr führt euch auf unterschiedlichen Zeitebenen in das düstere Geheimnis einer zutiefst faszinierenden Hauptfigur. Mit Ein Teil von ihr haben Serienschöpferin Charlotte Stoudt (Homeland) und Regisseurin Minkie Spiro (3 Body Problem, All Her Fault) eine packende Miniserie auf Netflix kreiert, die sich mit Identität und Verantwortung auseinandersetzt. Darum geht's in der Netflix-Miniserie Ein Teil von ihr Ein bewaffneter Überfall in einem Diner bringt das Leben von Andy ( Bella Heathcote ) durcheinander: Ausgerechnet ihre Mutter Laura ( Toni Collette ) stoppt den Angreifer.

stories.title: Patreon is laying off 20 percent of workers
stories.summary: Patreon is laying off 20 percent of its workers, or around 93 employees, as reported earlier by 404 Media. In a memo to employees, Patreon CEO Jack Conte writes that the company isn’t making these changes “because we believe AI replaces humans,” but says AI has “fundamentally transformed the tech industry, including how we work, how we build products, how we communicate, and more.” That shift has changed “how we operate and organize,” Conte writes.

stories.title: Trump Throws a Potential Wrench in the Saudi Nuclear Deal He Just Inked
stories.summary: Saudi Arabia has long said that a condition of normalizing relations with Israel would be a pathway toward Palestinian statehood, a prospect that Israel’s current government has rejected.

stories.title: The Tate Brothers Are Losing Right-Wing Allies After Their Arrest
stories.summary: After Andrew and Tristan Tate, prominent leaders of the so-called manosphere, were arrested in Miami, many of their onetime allies on the American right pulled back support.

stories.title: A Russian Spy, Suddenly Cast Into the Spotlight, Flees Japan
stories.summary: The military intelligence officer left the country after The Times reported that he was using the Aeroflot airline office in Tokyo to conduct espionage.

stories.title: Sony Revives Cinerama Dome in Los Angeles as Box Office Sales Rebound
stories.summary: The iconic Cinerama Dome and adjacent 14-screen theater complex will reopen in 2028 after a renovation. The venue closed in 2020 because of the pandemic.

stories.title: U.S. to Withdraw Subpoenas Issued to New York Times Journalists
stories.summary: A federal judge raised questions about the government’s handling of the subpoenas, which The Times said were an attempt to intimidate the free press.

stories.title: Modric, 40, signs new AC Milan deal
stories.summary: Luka Modric, the 40-year-old midfielder, has signed a one-year contract extension with AC Milan after joining the club last summer. The Croatian international, who previously spent 13 years at Real Madrid, contributed two goals in 37 appearances during a season where Milan finished fifth in Serie A. Modric expressed his excitement to continue with the team, aiming to bounce back after a disappointing season.

stories.title: Final Coyote vs. Acme trailer drops at SDCC
stories.summary: The final trailer for Coyote vs. Acme was unveiled at San Diego Comic-Con, ahead of its theatrical release on August 28, 2026. The film features a unique storyline that intertwines the classic Coyote character with new adventures, promising a fresh take on the beloved franchise. Following the trailer's debut, fans are eagerly anticipating how this reimagining will unfold on the big screen.

stories.title: Key Republican Senator Says He Will Support Erica Schwartz for C.D.C. Director
stories.summary: Senator Bill Cassidy, who is believed to hold the deciding vote in the Senate health committee for Dr. Erica Schwartz’s confirmation, had declined for days to say whether he would back her.

stories.title: A Peptide Showdown: F.D.A. Scientists May Clash With R.F.K.’s Agenda
stories.summary: Agency scientists are advising against allowing widespread use of several peptide injections. Robert F. Kennedy Jr., the health secretary, has said people should be free to experiment.

stories.title: BBC Inside Science
stories.summary: A Pentagon initiative will screen U.S. military personnel aged 30 and older for testosterone deficiency, offering voluntary hormone replacement therapy to those with low levels. The move aims to maintain a "healthy, capable" fighting force, Secretary of Defense Pete Hegseth announced. Meanwhile, Houthi attacks on Red Sea oil tankers sent global oil prices surging.

stories.title: ‘Odyssey’ Popcorn Buckets Help Fuel a $100 Million Market
stories.summary: Once, a tub of popcorn was just a tub of popcorn. Now, ‘collectible concession vessels’ could make one chain more than $100 million.

stories.title: The only way to stop petrol pump thieves | Brief letters
stories.summary: I was once visiting Massachusetts in the US and forgot to take my card into the gas station before filling up ( ‘A guy did a runner in a Jaguar’: the petrol theft scandal – and the garage owner struggling to stop it, 21 July ). After some loudspeaker remonstration, I took my card in, apologising that I’d forgotten as we don’t do that in the UK. The owner almost fell on the floor laughing. “How do you stop people stealing gas?” he asked. “We don’t,” I replied. Further merriment ensued. Sadly, it’s time we did start not releasing pumps until we have cash or a card deposit on hand.

stories.title: Risk of Parkinson’s disease may increase with prolonged exposure to road traffic noise
stories.summary: A major study involving 3.1 million Danish participants has found that long-term exposure to road traffic noise increases the risk of developing Parkinson's disease. Specifically, for every 11.5 decibel rise in noise level, the risk increases by 3%. Researchers suggest that having a quieter area in the home may help mitigate this risk, highlighting the importance of noise management in urban planning.

stories.title: Poorest children in England 40% more likely to be hospitalised for lung infections
stories.summary: Children living in the poorest areas across England are 40% more likely to be admitted to hospital for respiratory infections, an analysis of NHS England data shows, with experts raising the alarm on the impact of air pollution on young people’s health. The analysis, based on data obtained via freedom of information requests by the charity Impact on Urban Health, revealed 1,941 out of every 100,000 children living in the most deprived fifth of England were admitted to hospital for respiratory illnesses in 2024-25.

offbeat.title: Torino, donna morta: il corpo nascosto nel cassettone del letto
offbeat.summary: Il corpo di Daniela Florea, 35 anni di origini romene, è stato trovato in un appartamento del quartiere Barriera di Milano, avvolto in un telo e nascosto nel vano contenitore del letto. La procura ha aperto un fascicolo per omicidio. L'autopsia è in programma domani. La casa era in ordine e gli investigatori non escludono che la vittima conoscesse il suo assassino ascolta articolo Sceglici su: Il corpo di una donna avvolto in un telo e nascosto nel vano contenitore del letto, in un appartamento trovato in perfetto ordine.

offbeat.title: The Undeclared War review – Simon Pegg’s cyber-attack thriller fails to push any of the right buttons
offbeat.summary: I f the espionage battles of the future are going to be fought online, TV thrillers will have to reflect that fact, much as they might not want to. Cyber-attacks, cross-border malware and digital misinformation just aren’t especially televisual: whatever you do, you always end up with a speed-typing nerd muttering “Shit!” as gobbledegook scrolls across a monitor and red lights flash in the distance. In 2022, Channel 4’s missable drama The Undeclared War tried to crack the problem by throwing heavyweight film-making pedigree at it.

offbeat.title: Arsenal set to make £70m bid for Newcastle's Guimaraes
offbeat.summary: Arsenal are set to make a £70m offer for Newcastle captain Bruno Guimaraes. Brazil international Guimaraes is a priority target for the Gunners, with the midfielder keen to join the Premier League champions. Newcastle are aware of the 28-year-old's preference to join Arsenal this summer. Talks over a potential move for Guimaraes are ongoing and are believed to have accelerated in recent days. The agreement of personal terms is not expected to be an issue, though it remains to be seen if Arsenal 's £70m offer will meet Newcastle 's valuation.

offbeat.title: Alerte Météo : Fortes chaleurs persistantes au sud
offbeat.summary: Du jeudi 23 juillet à 17:00 au vendredi 24 juillet à 18:00 Situation Les températures baissent légèrement autour de la Méditerranée, mais restent élevées avec 32 à 35°C, localement 36 à 37°C. Ce vendredi, la chaleur s’accentue dans le sud-ouest, avec plus de 40°C localement. Le mistral et le vent d’ouest maintiendront un risque d’incendie très élevé à maximal dans le sud-est. Enfin, une dégradation orageuse est attendue samedi sur un grand quart sud-est, avec une probable alerte. Par ailleurs, nous dirigeons vers une 4e canicule à l'échelle nationale la semaine prochaine. Observation Ce jeudi Les températures ont été très élevées au sud avec localement une chaleur extrême.

offbeat.title: DIRECT. Incendies en France: un sapeur-pompier blessé et évacué en combattant les flammes en Gironde
offbeat.summary: Un feu très virulent sévit depuis mercredi à proximité du bassin d'Arcachon en Gironde. Des évacuations, à titre préventif, sont menées par la préfecture. Dans le Var, les pompiers n'ont toujours pas fixé l'incendie "contenu" ce jeudi 23 juillet, alors que l'inquiétude est ravivée par les conditions météorologiques. Aujourd'hui à 21h37 Un pompier en Gironde évoque un incendie "toujours hors de contrôle" Guillaume Millet, sapeur-pompier et secrétaire fédéral CFDT en Gironde évoque un feu d'une "violence similaire" aux incendies qui ont touché la Gironde en 2022. "Ce feu peut partir dans n'importe quel sens aujourd'hui", explique-t-il à BFMTV.

offbeat.title: Consumentenbond ziet opnieuw misleiding door groot techbedrijf: massaclaim tegen Thuisbezorgd dreigt
offbeat.summary: Thuisbezorgd verborgen kosten 23 jul 2026, 18:52 Wil je net afrekenen, moet je ineens 4 euro extra betalen. Bij Thuisbezorgd gebeurt het regelmatig. De Consumentenbond wil nu dat het platform klanten daarvoor compenseert. Uniek is het overigens niet, veel meer webwinkels hebben verborgen kosten. Volgens de Consumentenbond zijn honderden miljoenen mensen gedupeerd omdat ze bij het afrekenen ineens meer kosten kregen voor verplichte service, tasjes, plastic verpakkingen en saus. Kosten die eerder in het bestelproces duidelijk hadden moeten zijn. Als Thuisbezorgd niet snel iets verandert, komt de Consumentenbond met een massaclaim. Een middel dat steeds vaker wordt gebruikt.

offbeat.title: Colapinto lanza un dardo al Mundial de España: "Fueron muy aburridos con las canciones"
offbeat.summary: El gol de Ferran Torres en el minuto 106 de la final del MetLife de Nueva Jersey sigue en boca de todos. Fue el que coronó a España por segunda vez, tras el mítico gol de Andrés Iniesta en el Soccer City ante Holanda, en la Copa del Mundo de Fútbol. Un tanto que derrotó a la campeona defensora Argentina y que tiene eco hasta en la Fórmula 1. En Spa se vivió casi más la final que el Gran Premio de Bélgica y su resaca juega un papel en Hungría. La Fórmula 1 lo aprovechó y juntó en la misma rueda de prensa a los dos españoles, Carlos Sainz y Fernando Alonso, con el único argentino, Franco Colapinto. Sobre el campeón no existió debate. "Siempre sentí que ganaría España.

offbeat.title: World Matchplay Darts LIVE! Updates, video, analysis, scores, commentary with Luke Littler, Gary Anderson, Josh Rock in action
offbeat.summary: Live Watch the World Matchplay Darts 2026 across Sky Sports from July 18 until July 2026 Thursday 23 July 2026 20:49, UK This content is provided by , which may be using cookies and other technologies. To show you this content, we need your permission to use cookies. You can use the buttons below to amend your preferences to enable cookies or to allow those cookies just once. You can change your settings at any time via the Privacy Options . Unfortunately we have been unable to verify if you have consented to cookies. To view this content you can use the button below to allow cookies for this session only.

offbeat.title: Charlize Theron under fire for comments on Matt Damon's body in The Odyssey
offbeat.summary: Charlize Theron is receiving criticism following remarks about co-star Matt Damon's physical appearance while promoting The Odyssey. The Oscar-winning actress, who portrays Calypso alongside Damon's Odysseus in Christopher Nolan's upcoming film , discussed the actor's look candidly during a recent interview. While addressing Damon's preparation for the character, Theron acknowledged she was struck by his transformation. "I've seen him without all of that suit on. He's incredible. Incredible," she shared in a new interview. Theron then continued, making light of the fact that she found herself noticing more than simply his acting on set for The Odyssey, which just came out this week.

offbeat.title: Le previsioni meteo in Friuli Venezia Giulia di venerdì 24 luglio
offbeat.summary: 23 Luglio 2026 Il meteo in Friuli Venezia Giulia per venerdì 24 luglio sarà caratterizzato da condizioni in prevalenza stabili , con cielo generalmente sereno. Nel corso del pomeriggio, potranno aumentare gli annuvolamenti, in particolare sui rilievi , mentre il quadro meteorologico resterà nel complesso stabile. Temperature e venti Le temperature previste indicano valori massimi compresi tra 26 e 29 gradi in pianura , mentre lungo la costa le massime saranno tra 26 e 28 gradi. In montagna, a quota 2 mila metri, le temperature massime si attesteranno intorno ai 9 gradi. I venti saranno generalmente a regime di brezza ; in serata sulla costa è prevista la possibilità di Bora moderata.

offbeat.title: Samsung étend son écosystème Galaxy aux lunettes connectées
offbeat.summary: Développées avec Gentle Monster et Warby Parker, les lunettes intelligentes permettent à chaque utilisateur de défendre son style. Samsung Electronics Co., Ltd. A présenté aujourd’hui ses lunettes intelligentes lors de la conférence Galaxy Unpacked à Londres. Basés sur des concepts présentés lors du dernier évènement Google I/O, ces modèles ont été développés avec des lunetiers reconnus : Gentle Monster et Warby Parker. Ces lunettes intelligentes montent comment l’écosystème Galaxy va bien au-delà du smartphone pour transformer notre façon de travailler, de profiter et d’exécuter des tâches en gardant les mains libres.

offbeat.title: About 150 women turned away for private care by National Maternity Hospital consultants
offbeat.summary: About 150 women have been turned away for private care by consultants at the National Maternity Hospital (NMH) over the last six weeks, as private maternity services begin to end in Irish hospitals . A senior clinician at one of the biggest maternity hospitals in the country said it was only the second time in almost 30 years that he could recall doctors at Holles Street refusing mothers who wanted to go private. Declan Keane, clinical director and former master at the NMH, said the end of private maternity care in publicly funded hospitals was “kicking in already” and “will be a real problem” over the next five years.

offbeat.title: Carlos Latre se marcha de Mediaset: "Cuando termine 'Got Talent' finaliza mi contrato"
offbeat.summary: Carlos Latre se marcha de Mediaset. El cómico ha revelado esta información en exclusiva en una entrevista a la revista Lecturas, en el marco del estreno de la nueva película de Tadeo Jones, donde ha puesto voz a varios personajes. Ha sido en una pregunta relacionada con Got Talent donde el intérprete ha confirmado su salida del grupo de comunicación. "¿Dónde más te vamos a poder ver?", le pregunta el periodista Adrián López, a lo que Latre le responde: "Estamos todavía acabando la grabación de Got Talent, una nueva edición en la que se crean equipos y hay una dinámica diferente. Y luego después ya finaliza mi contrato y mi colaboración con Mediaset".

offbeat.title: Bruce Willis makes ultra-rare public appearance amid health battle
offbeat.summary: Bruce Willis was spotted riding around Studio City in Los Angeles on July 19, in an ultra-rare appearance for the Die Hard actor, who was diagnosed with frontotemporal dementia (FTD) in 2023. The 71-year-old looked laid back as he sat in the passenger seat, dressed in a blue jacket and navy trucker cap. The outing comes amid his health battle, which has caused Bruce to lose much of his ability to speak due to the debilitating brain disorder. FTD symptoms can range from changes in behavior to loss of empathy and memory issues. Bruce was initially diagnosed with aphasia in 2022, before his family discovered that he was actually suffering from FTD.

offbeat.title: Ascolti tv ieri, vince 'Tim Summer Hits': lo show di Rai 1 batte Canale 5
offbeat.summary: Home Spettacoli Ascolti tv, 'Tim Summer Hits' su Rai1 vince prime time: share al 18.6% . Lo show ha ottenuto un ascolto medio di oltre due milioni di spettatori Carlo Conti e Andrea Delogu - Ipa/Fotogramma 22 luglio 2026 | 12.24 Ilaria Floris LETTURA: 1 minuti E' Rai1 con 'Tim Summer Hits' a vincere la sfida della prima serata di ieri, martedì 21 luglio 2026 . Lo show ha ottenuto un ascolto medio di 2.015.000 spettatori, pari al 18.6% di share. Canale5, con 'Delibal – Dolce veleno', è stato la scelta di 1.397.000 spettatori, con uno share del 12.4%.

offbeat.title: Resident Evil's killer new trailer throws Raccoon City's worst at Austin Abrams
offbeat.summary: Follow Empire on Google We’re slap-bang in the middle of summer right now. But once The Odyssey and Spider-Man: Brand New Day and The End Of Oak Street are done delivering popcorn thrills, it’ll be time to pivot to spooky-mode. And of all the horror offerings in the upcoming Halloween slate, one looks particularly exciting: Zach Cregger’s Resident Evil . The director of Weapons is already back with his follow-up film, a rollocking ride through the world of the beloved games, but with a story and character of Cregger’s own creation: Austin Abrams’ non-heroic normie, Bryan.

offbeat.title: Rayner rules out repaying severance cash after making cabinet return
offbeat.summary: A lump sum, equivalent of 25% of the annual ministerial salary, is payable when a minister stops holding office. Departing ministers who are aged over 65 or are reappointed within three weeks do not qualify. The 2025/26 accounts , external for the Ministry of Housing, Communities and Local Government record the severance payment for Rayner. In her first interview since returning to government, Rayner was pressed on whether she would return the money.

offbeat.title: Fonte des glaces au Groenland: des chercheurs révèlent son véritable impact sur l’AMOC
offbeat.summary: La circulation méridienne de retournement de l’Atlantique (AMOC) est l'un des principaux systèmes de courants océaniques de la planète et joue un rôle essentiel dans la régulation du climat mondial. Concrètement, elle transporte une immense quantité de chaleur vers l'Europe, contribuant à son climat relativement doux, influence les précipitations en Afrique, en Amérique du Sud et en Amérique du Nord, participe au stockage de la chaleur et du dioxyde de carbone dans les océans et agit sur le niveau de la mer et les événements météorologiques extrêmes.

offbeat.title: Final hurrah? Glasgow’s cut-price Commonwealth Games fight for survival
offbeat.summary: S ometimes when a non-responsive person is close to death, a strange medical phenomena occurs. From apparently nowhere they experience a burst of energy. They recognise people again. They start to speak in sentences. Relatives even dare to hope. But, sadly, that hope is short-lived. Doctors call it terminal lucidity. And it comes to mind at the dawn of the 23rd Commonwealth Games . Less than three years ago, the Games were on life support after the original hosts, Victoria, effectively paid AUS$380m (£199m) to pull out because it feared losses running into the billions. Glasgow then stepped in to host a cheaper and stripped back event, with only 10 sports compared to 19 four years ago.

offbeat.title: The Commonwealth’s greatest prize lies beyond the Games
offbeat.summary: Today, Glasgow will once again become the meeting place of the Commonwealth, as athletes and supporters from 56 nations descend on its red-sandstone streets for the Commonwealth Games . For the next fortnight, sporting triumphs will capture the attention of millions across the Commonwealth. Josh Kerr and Adam Peaty will have the British willing them towards gold. Yet when the closing ceremony draws to an end, another prize will remain before us – one with the power to enrich every Commonwealth citizen: the untapped capacity of our network to increase trade, investment and enterprise between its members.

offbeat.title: L'allarme Mar Rosso spinge il petrolio a 100$ e affonda le Borse. Milano chiude a -2,8%
offbeat.summary: (Il Sole 24 Ore Radiocor) - Archiviano una seduta di vendite le Borse europee , con il Ftse Mib in ribasso del 2,8% , mentre lo spettro di uno shock energetico che torna protagonista sulla scena globale. Alle preoccupazioni su un’imminente escalation delle ostilità tra Washington e Teheran si sommano infatti gli attacchi da parte dei ribelli Houthi dello Yemen nel Mar Rosso, che minacciano le vitali forniture di petrolio dell'Arabia Saudita: a far paura ora è la chiusura simultanea dello stretto di Bab al-Mandab (oltre che dello Stretto di Hormuz), una delle ultime rotte rimaste per il trasporto del greggio del Golfo verso i mercati globali.

offbeat.title: Spritpreise in Europa: Dieser Konzern deckelt jetzt den Literpreis
offbeat.summary: Frankreich greift durch Total deckelt Preise an 3.300 Tankstellen 23.07.2026 - 10:37 Uhr Lesedauer: 1 Min. Während Frankreich die Spritpreise deckelt, plant Berlin keine neue Unterstützung für Autofahrer. Ein Energiekonzern greift nun zu einer drastischen Maßnahme und nennt eine überraschende Begründung. Der Konflikt mit dem Iran treibt die Kraftstoffpreise in Europa nach oben. In Frankreich reagiert der Energiekonzern Total und stoppt die Teuerung an seinen Zapfsäulen. Die deutsche Bundesregierung dagegen plant keine erneute Unterstützung für Autofahrer. Loading... Embed Preisgarantie an 3.300 Zapfsäulen Der Mineralölriese Total begrenzt ab sofort seine Preise in Frankreich.

offbeat.title: Shels and Derry search for Conference League sparks
offbeat.summary: CONFERENCE LEAGUE SECOND ROUND QUALIFIER, FIRST LEG Shelbourne v Nomme Kalju, Tolka Park, 7.45pm Rijeka v Derry City, Stadion HNK Rijeka, 7.45pm WATCH Rijeka v Derry City is available to stream via the club's website. Shelbourne v Nomme Kalju is available to stream via LOITV. ONLINE Live blog on RTÉ.ie/Sport and the RTÉ News app. Shels enter Europe searching for a spark It has been a very disappointing campaign for Shelbourne, who are currently fifth in the league table, 16 points off Shamrock Rovers. They just haven't got going this year, with Joey O'Brien's June departure the inevitable conclusion to a rotten run of form.

offbeat.title: „Das Fest“ 2026: Jetzt bringt Nico Santos den Hügel zum Beben
offbeat.summary: Live-Ticker vom Gelände „Das Fest“ 2026: Jetzt bringt Nico Santos den Hügel zum Beben „Das Fest“ 2026 hat begonnen. Alle Infos und Eindrücke des beliebten Karlsruher Sommer-Events gibt’s im Liveticker. Nico Santos sorgt für große Begeisterung im Publikum. Foto: Nelly Kühn „Das Fest“ 2026 hat begonnen. Alle Informationen und Eindrücke des beliebten Karlsruher Sommer-Events gibt’s im Liveticker.

offbeat.title: Matt Damon and Ben Affleck have been friends for decades, but now their lives are worlds apart
offbeat.summary: Forty years ago, two Boston buddies shared a dream. One Oscar later, their personal lives and Hollywood careers couldn’t be more different Marianka Swain Show biography Marianka Swain has been a culture and features writer for the Telegraph since 2018. She covers a wide range of topics, from celebrity and royal stories to West End openings and the dilemmas of modern life. She is a Strictly Come Dancing devotee, but sadly has never won a trophy for her own moves, glitterball or otherwise. Published 14 July 2026 2:00pm BST The four-decade friendship between A-listers Matt Damon and Ben Affleck is astonishingly enduring, given the fickle nature of Hollywood.

offbeat.title: Meet Gal Gadot's businessman husband and 4 lookalike daughters
offbeat.summary: Gal Gadot catapulted to global fame following her breakout performance as Wonder Woman i n the 2017 hit. The 41-year-old Israeli actress has since become one of Hollywood's most recognisable faces, earning a spot on Time's 100 most influential people in the world in 2018, as well as a star on the Hollywood Walk of Fame in 2025. The Snow White star, also known for her roles in Red Notice and Death on the Nile , balances her thriving career with a busy family life as the mother of four daughters. © WireImage Gal Gadot is famed for her stellar Hollywood career Keep reading to find out more about Gal's life off-screen with her businessman husband and children.

offbeat.title: Walking outside in Malaga in 40C 'like opening an oven door'
offbeat.summary: Updated / Thursday, 23 Jul 2026 16:57 Emily Allen and her son Matias at home in Spain An Irish woman living in Spain has described trying to live and work in Malaga at the moment as difficult due to temperatures topping 40C. Emily Allen has been living in Spain for 25 years. She told RTÉ's News at One that the problem is not just the high temperatures. "It's also the fact that here we have the Terral wind, which is basically hot wind kind of blowing in your face the minute you walk outside, it's like opening an oven door. "Also, we have what's called like Saharan calima, kind of like a haze of desert dust, which has just come over in the last hour. So, it's all hazy at the moment.

offbeat.title: Singapour: l'interdiction du chewing-gum, entre contrôle social et obsession hygiéniste
offbeat.summary: Singapour est réputée pour ses rues impeccables, ses transports publics efficaces et l'application extrêmement stricte de ses lois. Nombre d'entre elles concernent l'hygiène et la propreté, dont la plus célèbre est l'interdiction quasi totale du chewing-gum. Sur le chewing-gum, la loi singapourienne ne mâche pas ses mots. Le Sale of Food Act indique que « la vente ou la publicité en faveur de la vente de tout chewing-gum est interdite » et le Regulation of Imports and Exports Act rappelle que « l'importation de chewing-gum à Singapour est interdite ». Contrevenir peut vous coûter cher : une amende de 2 000 dollars (1 300 euros) en cas de vente illégale.

offbeat.title: France evacuates 20,000 as wildfires spread in south-west
offbeat.summary: Wildfires in the Gironde region of south-west France have prompted the evacuation of 20,000 people, including 10,000 visitors from campsites, as flames have consumed 3,400 hectares of land. Approximately 700 firefighters are battling the blazes, with conditions worsening due to rising temperatures and strong winds. Authorities are continuing evacuations and closing roads in vulnerable areas as they work to contain the fires.

offbeat.title: The CW's Near-Perfect 4-Season Comedy Is Finally Heading to Free Streaming Next Month
offbeat.summary: Published Jul 18, 2026, 4:00 PM EDT Florencia is a Movies & TV writer at CBR who brings her love of pop culture and storytelling to every piece she writes. Whether diving into the humor of sitcoms, the creativity of adult animation, or the thrills of horror, she enjoys exploring what makes great entertainment resonate with audiences. Since joining CBR, Florencia has combined sharp analysis with a genuine enthusiasm for fan culture, always ready to discuss the stories, characters, and twists that keep viewers hooked. The CW is known for shows like Gossip Girl, The Vampire Diaries, Arrow, and Riverdale.

offbeat.title: Kerry unchanged as captain Geaney named among subs
offbeat.summary: Updated / Thursday, 23 Jul 2026 20:25 Seán O'Shea and Paudie Clifford have switched lines in the Kerry attack for Sunday's decider Kerry manager Jack O'Shea has named an unchanged side for Sunday’s All-Ireland football final against Mayo, with captain Paul Geaney named among the substitutes. The 35-year-old didn’t feature in the semi-final victory over Dublin and is listed among the substitutes. Should he be introduced, it would be an eight All-Ireland final appearance for the Dingle man. While the personnel remains the same, O’Connor has, on paper at least, tinkered with his attack.

offbeat.title: Wetterbericht für Niedersachsen/Bremen (23.07.2026)
offbeat.summary: Heute zeigt sich das Wetter in der Region überwiegend stark bewölkt. Vereinzelt sind Schauer möglich, im Tagesverlauf lockert die Bewölkung jedoch vielerorts auf. Vor allem im Nordosten ist mit mehr Sonnenschein zu rechnen. Die Höchstwerte liegen zwischen 18 und 21 Grad, es bleibt also eher kühl für die Jahreszeit. Der Wind weht schwach bis mäßig aus Nordwest, an der See kann er frisch und zeitweise böig sein. In der Nacht zum morgigen Freitag ist es zunächst klar, von Nordwesten zieht jedoch zunehmend starke Bewölkung auf, vereinzelt sind ein paar Tropfen möglich. Im Südosten bleibt es dagegen aufgeklart. Die Tiefstwerte liegen um 14 Grad an der See und um 10 Grad im Binnenland.

offbeat.title: "Chicago Med XI"
offbeat.summary: New episodes of the medical drama "Chicago Med" premiere Thursday, July 23, on Italia 1 at 9 p.m. The eleventh season follows doctors and nurses at Gaffney Chicago Medical Center as they tackle high-stakes emergencies and ethical dilemmas. The season introduces new cast members and explores unresolved storylines from the previous finale.

offbeat.title: Émission du jeudi 23 juillet 2026 en replay - ICI 19/20 - Provence Alpes Côte d'Azur
offbeat.summary: Ici JT Vidéo 38 min 57 s Français Tous publics Disponible jusqu'au 30/07/2026 Le rendez-vous vespéral des rédactions régionales de France Télévisions, avec les journaux locaux, la météo et les reportages propres à chaque région. En savoir plus Diffusé le 23/07/2026 à 19h14 - Disponible jusqu'au 30/07/2026 Le rendez-vous vespéral des rédactions régionales de France Télévisions, avec les journaux locaux, la météo et les reportages propres à chaque région.

offbeat.title: HNK Rijeka Away – Live Stream
offbeat.summary: We are delighted to provide details of a Live Stream for Thursday’s UEFA Conference League away leg against HNK Rijeka in Croatia. Partnering with Solidsport , the second qualifying round game at Stadion HNK Rijeka will be broadcast live on derrycityplay.com costing £12. Stream Link Commentary is due to be provided by Drive 105. The match will kick-off at 7.45pm Irish time , 8.45pm local. The Brunswick Moviebowl are also showing the game live in their cinema. Book Your Cinema Tickets here.

offbeat.title: Hochspannende Miniserie bei Netflix: Dieser Thriller lässt euch mit düsterem Geheimnis 8 Folgen lang keine Ruhe
offbeat.summary: In dieser Thriller-Serie bei Netflix zählt jede Minute: Ein Teil von ihr führt euch auf unterschiedlichen Zeitebenen in das düstere Geheimnis einer zutiefst faszinierenden Hauptfigur. Mit Ein Teil von ihr haben Serienschöpferin Charlotte Stoudt (Homeland) und Regisseurin Minkie Spiro (3 Body Problem, All Her Fault) eine packende Miniserie auf Netflix kreiert, die sich mit Identität und Verantwortung auseinandersetzt. Darum geht's in der Netflix-Miniserie Ein Teil von ihr Ein bewaffneter Überfall in einem Diner bringt das Leben von Andy ( Bella Heathcote ) durcheinander: Ausgerechnet ihre Mutter Laura ( Toni Collette ) stoppt den Angreifer.

offbeat.title: Final Coyote vs. Acme trailer drops at SDCC
offbeat.summary: The final trailer for Coyote vs. Acme was unveiled at San Diego Comic-Con, ahead of its theatrical release on August 28, 2026. The film features a unique storyline that intertwines the classic Coyote character with new adventures, promising a fresh take on the beloved franchise. Following the trailer's debut, fans are eagerly anticipating how this reimagining will unfold on the big screen.

tech.title: FCC Chairman Brendan Carr’s war on the First Amendment
tech.summary: As the chairman of the Federal Communications Commission, Brendan Carr has authority over the nation’s TV, radio, and internet. But since Donald Trump was elected to his second term, Carr has wielded that power to threaten broadcasters that have exercised their free speech rights to make jokes about the president. He was even able to get ABC to briefly pull Jimmy Kimmel from his late-night show. As The Verge editor-in-chief Nilay Patel has said, Carr’s mission is to “trash the First Amendment.” We’ll be following closely as the FCC chairman attempts to erode Americans’ constitutional rights.

tech.title: Claude’s voice mode is now available for Opus and Sonnet
tech.summary: Until now, voice mode has only been available on Claude Haiku, Anthropic’s faster but less powerful model. Now the company is making its Opus and Sonnet models available in voice mode, and extending its reach into apps like Gmail, Slack, and Canva. When Anthropic launched voice mode last year, it was primarily focused on delivering answers to quick questions with minimal delay. But in a blog post, the company said people immediately started using voice mode for far more than casual queries. They were using it to work “through real business problems,” which Haiku was not really designed for.

tech.title: Patreon is laying off 20 percent of workers
tech.summary: Patreon is laying off 20 percent of its workers, or around 93 employees, as reported earlier by 404 Media. In a memo to employees, Patreon CEO Jack Conte writes that the company isn’t making these changes “because we believe AI replaces humans,” but says AI has “fundamentally transformed the tech industry, including how we work, how we build products, how we communicate, and more.” That shift has changed “how we operate and organize,” Conte writes.

entertainment.title: Patreon Lays Off 20% of Employees as Part of ‘Painful’ Restructuring
entertainment.summary: Patreon , the creator-focused monetization platform, said on Thursday it was laying off 20% of its employees as it changed how its internal structure operates. The cuts will affect 93 Patreon employees, who will be given at least 16 weeks of severance payments. In a note to staff posted online, CEO Jack Conte said the company’s “core business” remained “strong and consistent,” but the platform had to respond to “profound” market changes this year affecting how Patreon navigates the creator economy. “We need to adjust our cost structure to ensure that we remain a stable, dependable rock for our creators as we work toward our long term ambition,” he wrote.

entertainment.title: LISTEN: How Travis Scott is Ascending to Culture Moguldom Through Music, Movies, Retail, Business and More
entertainment.summary: Travis Scott is solidifying his status as a cultural mogul following a record-setting music tour and a role in Christopher Nolan's film "The Odyssey." His Cactus Jack production company has secured a first-look deal with Paramount Pictures, signaling his ambitions in film and television. As he continues to expand his influence through music, retail partnerships, and new ventures, Scott is poised to make a significant impact in the entertainment industry.

entertainment.title: L.A. Production Volume Down Slightly, as Recovery Continues to Sputter
entertainment.summary: Los Angeles production volume fell slightly in the second quarter of 2026, as an increase in state tax incentives has failed to overcome industry headwinds. Shoot days for TV, film and commercials dropped by 3.1% compared to the previous quarter, according to FilmLA , which tracks location permit data for the L.A. region. Films and commercials both dropped, offsetting an increase in TV production for the quarter — though all three categories remain well below historic levels. California more than doubled its support for film and TV production last year in response to the post-strike slump.

crisis.title: Help for electricity bills as crude oil hits $100
crisis.summary: The States of Guernsey said it would give Alderney Electricity £200,000 to offset islanders' bills. Jeannie Cameron, who chairs the committee, said the funds would be applied directly to customers' bills. She said: "The recent rise in global oil prices has the potential to place additional financial pressure on households and businesses at a time when many are already managing increased costs. "This temporary measure provides a level of protection against exceptional fuel price increases while ensuring that public funds are only used where they are genuinely needed." Cameron said unlike its sister islands Guernsey and Jersey, Alderney did not have cable supplying electricity from France.

crisis.title: Sony Revives Cinerama Dome in Los Angeles as Box Office Sales Rebound
crisis.summary: The iconic Cinerama Dome and adjacent 14-screen theater complex will reopen in 2028 after a renovation. The venue closed in 2020 because of the pandemic.

crisis.title: ‘Odyssey’ Popcorn Buckets Help Fuel a $100 Million Market
crisis.summary: Once, a tub of popcorn was just a tub of popcorn. Now, ‘collectible concession vessels’ could make one chain more than $100 million.

politics.title: Burnham says 20% business rates cut for English pubs 'a first step'
politics.summary: Some hospitality firms will get a discount from next April but hotels and restaurants won't get a cut. By Henry Zeffman Chief political correspondent and Archie Mitchell Business reporter Pubs, social clubs and live music venues in England will be given a 20% cut to business rates from April, with new Prime Minister Andy Burnham calling it a "first step" to help the industry. It is his third policy announcement since entering No 10, and the government estimates the plan will save firms around £1,100 next year. With a cost of £100m, it will be funded by a review of tax relief on firms such as vape shops which "do not make a positive contribution to local communities", the government said.

politics.title: U.S. to Withdraw Subpoenas Issued to New York Times Journalists
politics.summary: A federal judge raised questions about the government’s handling of the subpoenas, which The Times said were an attempt to intimidate the free press.

politics.title: Key Republican Senator Says He Will Support Erica Schwartz for C.D.C. Director
politics.summary: Senator Bill Cassidy, who is believed to hold the deciding vote in the Senate health committee for Dr. Erica Schwartz’s confirmation, had declined for days to say whether he would back her.

facts.title: Look for NASA+ Now Streaming on Amazon Fire TV
facts.summary: NASA+ is now streaming on Amazon Fire TV Channels starting July 24, 2026. Viewers can access the free, ad-free service via Alexa+ on compatible devices or through the NASA app and website. Future coverage will include Artemis missions, lunar deliveries, and the first crewed Moon landing.

facts.title: A Peptide Showdown: F.D.A. Scientists May Clash With R.F.K.’s Agenda
facts.summary: Agency scientists are advising against allowing widespread use of several peptide injections. Robert F. Kennedy Jr., the health secretary, has said people should be free to experiment.

facts.title: BBC Inside Science
facts.summary: A Pentagon initiative will screen U.S. military personnel aged 30 and older for testosterone deficiency, offering voluntary hormone replacement therapy to those with low levels. The move aims to maintain a "healthy, capable" fighting force, Secretary of Defense Pete Hegseth announced. Meanwhile, Houthi attacks on Red Sea oil tankers sent global oil prices surging.

sports.title: Italy confirm Ancelotti approach before Guardiola
sports.summary: Italy held discussions with Carlo Ancelotti to become their national team manager before opening talks with Pep Guardiola. Italy approached Carlo Ancelotti to become their national team manager before holding talks with Pep Guardiola. The Azzurri have been without a head coach since Gennaro Gattuso resigned in April following the country's failure to qualify for a third successive World Cup. Earlier this week, Italian Football Federation (FIGC) president Giovanni Malago said talks had been held with Guardiola, who left Manchester City this summer after 10 years, and "exceptions" could be made for his salary.

sports.title: Modric, 40, signs new AC Milan deal
sports.summary: Luka Modric, the 40-year-old midfielder, has signed a one-year contract extension with AC Milan after joining the club last summer. The Croatian international, who previously spent 13 years at Real Madrid, contributed two goals in 37 appearances during a season where Milan finished fifth in Serie A. Modric expressed his excitement to continue with the team, aiming to bounce back after a disappointing season.

breaking.title: Trump Throws a Potential Wrench in the Saudi Nuclear Deal He Just Inked
breaking.summary: Saudi Arabia has long said that a condition of normalizing relations with Israel would be a pathway toward Palestinian statehood, a prospect that Israel’s current government has rejected.

breaking.title: The Tate Brothers Are Losing Right-Wing Allies After Their Arrest
breaking.summary: After Andrew and Tristan Tate, prominent leaders of the so-called manosphere, were arrested in Miami, many of their onetime allies on the American right pulled back support.

breaking.title: A Russian Spy, Suddenly Cast Into the Spotlight, Flees Japan
breaking.summary: The military intelligence officer left the country after The Times reported that he was using the Aeroflot airline office in Tokyo to conduct espionage.

health.title: The only way to stop petrol pump thieves | Brief letters
health.summary: I was once visiting Massachusetts in the US and forgot to take my card into the gas station before filling up ( ‘A guy did a runner in a Jaguar’: the petrol theft scandal – and the garage owner struggling to stop it, 21 July ). After some loudspeaker remonstration, I took my card in, apologising that I’d forgotten as we don’t do that in the UK. The owner almost fell on the floor laughing. “How do you stop people stealing gas?” he asked. “We don’t,” I replied. Further merriment ensued. Sadly, it’s time we did start not releasing pumps until we have cash or a card deposit on hand.

health.title: Risk of Parkinson’s disease may increase with prolonged exposure to road traffic noise
health.summary: A major study involving 3.1 million Danish participants has found that long-term exposure to road traffic noise increases the risk of developing Parkinson's disease. Specifically, for every 11.5 decibel rise in noise level, the risk increases by 3%. Researchers suggest that having a quieter area in the home may help mitigate this risk, highlighting the importance of noise management in urban planning.

health.title: Poorest children in England 40% more likely to be hospitalised for lung infections
health.summary: Children living in the poorest areas across England are 40% more likely to be admitted to hospital for respiratory infections, an analysis of NHS England data shows, with experts raising the alarm on the impact of air pollution on young people’s health. The analysis, based on data obtained via freedom of information requests by the charity Impact on Urban Health, revealed 1,941 out of every 100,000 children living in the most deprived fifth of England were admitted to hospital for respiratory illnesses in 2024-25.
